## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run mypy server`
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q`
- [ ] `cd ui && npm run typecheck && npm run test`
- [ ] Documentation and generated references are current

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, or generated build artifacts are included
- [ ] Public APIs and CLI changes are documented
